Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Sub: Audio Recording of Investor Call held on 30th May 2024 
Ref: Reg. 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 
 
We refer to the above captioned subject, we herewith intimate to the Exchanges that the audio 
recording of the earnings call held on Thursday, 30th May 2024 has been uploaded in the 
Company’s website and can be accessed via the following link  
 
http://knrcl.com/transcriptofconcall.html  
 
This is for the information and records of the Exchange, please. 
 
 
Thanking you, 
Yours Truly, 
For KNR Constructions Limited 
 
 
 
Haritha Varanasi
